example: The autopsy report revealed the cause of death.
The lawyer prepared for the trial carefully.
The body was moved to the conservatory after being found in the kitchen.
The bloody footprints led to the suspect.
The witness said they saw the suspect leave to the left.
Only guilty people can't tell left from right.
The blood-covered candlestick now has my fingerprints on it.
At least you know the name of the victim.
